CREATE TRIGGER after_insert_team_attributes AFTER INSERT ON Team_Attributes
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    -- Update the previous record for the same team to set its eff_to to the new record's date
    UPDATE Team_Attributes
    SET eff_to = NEW.date
    WHERE team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id
      AND date = (
          SELECT date FROM Team_Attributes 
          WHERE team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id 
            AND date < NEW.date 
          ORDER BY date DESC 
          LIMIT 1
      );
    
    -- Update the newly inserted record to set its eff_to to the next record's date or '5999-12-31'
    UPDATE Team_Attributes
    SET eff_to = COALESCE(
        (SELECT date FROM Team_Attributes 
         WHERE team_api_id = NEW.team_api_id 
           AND date > NEW.date 
         ORDER BY date ASC 
         LIMIT 1),
        '5999-12-31'
    )
    WHERE id = NEW.id;
END

WITH RECURSIVE date_series AS (

    UNION ALL

    dd AS day_start,
    SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN T.incident_start < datetime(dd, 'start of day', '+1 day') AND T.incident_end > datetime(dd, 'start of day')
            THEN CAST(
                (julianday(
                    MIN(T.incident_end, datetime(dd, 'start of day', '+1 day'))
                ) - julianday(
                    MAX(T.incident_start, datetime(dd, 'start of day'))
                )) * 1440 AS INTEGER
            )
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) AS incident_minutes
FROM date_series
LEFT JOIN race_incidents AS T ON T.incident_start < datetime(dd, 'start of day', '+1 day') AND T.incident_end > datetime(dd, 'start of day')

WITH numbered AS (
    SELECT 
        prediction_code,
        Performance_Prediction,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY prediction_code) AS rn
    FROM erolp.performance_predictions
),
recursive_cte AS (
    SELECT 
        prediction_code,
        Performance_Prediction,
        rn,
        1 AS GroupNum,
        Performance_Prediction AS RollingSum
    FROM numbered
    WHERE rn = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        n.prediction_code,
        n.Performance_Prediction,
        n.rn,
        CASE 
            WHEN r.RollingSum + n.Performance_Prediction > 200 THEN r.GroupNum + 1 
            ELSE r.GroupNum 
        END AS GroupNum,
        CASE 
            WHEN r.RollingSum + n.Performance_Prediction > 200 THEN n.Performance_Prediction 
            ELSE r.RollingSum + n.Performance_Prediction 
        END AS RollingSum
    FROM recursive_cte r
    JOIN numbered n ON r.rn + 1 = n.rn
)
SELECT 
    GroupNum, 
    Performance_Prediction AS n,
    SUM(Performance_Prediction) OVER (PARTITION BY GroupNum) AS group_sum
FROM recursive_cte
ORDER BY GroupNum, prediction_code

        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(engagement_history, ',') > 0

            ELSE engagement_history
        END,
        CASE

            THEN SUBSTR(engagement_history, INSTR(engagement_history, ',') + 1)
            ELSE NULL
        END
    FROM learners_array
    WHERE engagement_history IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        learner_code,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(rest, ',') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, ',') - 1)
            ELSE rest
        END,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(rest, ',') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, ',') + 1)
            ELSE NULL
        END
    FROM split
    WHERE rest IS NOT NULL
)

WITH PatientExamData AS (
    SELECT 
        P.ID AS PATIENTID, 
        P.SEX, 
        P.BIRTHDAY, 
        E."Examination Date", 
        E.DIAGNOSIS, 
        E.THROMBOSIS, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY P.ID ORDER BY E."Examination Date") AS ExamRank 
    FROM patient AS P 
    LEFT JOIN examination AS E ON P.ID = E.ID
),
LatestLabResults AS (
    SELECT 
        L.ID, 
        L.PLT, 
        L.WBC, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY L.ID ORDER BY L."date" DESC) AS LabRank 
    FROM laboratory AS L 
    WHERE L."date" <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
),
PatientRiskProfile AS (
    SELECT 
        PED.PATIENTID, 
        PED.SEX, 
        PED.BIRTHDAY, 
        PED."Examination Date", 
        PED.DIAGNOSIS, 
        PED.THROMBOSIS, 
        CASE 
            WHEN LLR.PLT < 150 OR LLR.WBC > 11 THEN 'High' 
            WHEN PED.THROMBOSIS IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' 
            ELSE 'Normal' 
        END AS RiskCategory 
    FROM patientexamdata AS PED 
    LEFT JOIN latestlabresults AS LLR ON PED.PATIENTID = LLR.ID AND LLR.LabRank = 1
)
SELECT 
    PATIENTID, 
    SEX, 
    BIRTHDAY, 
    COUNT("Examination Date") AS EXAMINATIONCOUNT, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS THROMBOSISCOUNT, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NOTHROMBOSISCOUNT, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN RiskCategory = 'High' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HighRiskFlag 
FROM patientriskprofile 
GROUP BY PATIENTID, SEX, BIRTHDAY 
HAVING COUNT("Examination Date") > 0 
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC, PATIENTID

    a."County" AS county1,
    b."CDSCode" AS cdscode2,
    b."County" AS county2

SELECT

    a1.atom_id AS atom1_id,
    a1.element AS atom1_element,
    a2.atom_id AS atom2_id,
    a2.element AS atom2_element,
    c.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM connected AS c
INNER JOIN atom AS a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
INNER JOIN atom AS a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE a1.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
  AND a1.atom_id < a2.atom_id
ORDER BY a1.molecule_id, a1.atom_id, a2.atom_id

WITH pitStopsWithSeconds AS (
    SELECT raceId,
           time,
           (CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 + 
            CAST(SUBSTR(time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 + 
            CAST(SUBSTR(time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER)) AS seconds
    FROM pitStops
)
SELECT raceId, 
       SUM(diff) AS total_duration
FROM (
    SELECT raceId,
           seconds - LAG(seconds) OVER (PARTITION BY raceId ORDER BY seconds) AS diff
    FROM pitStopsWithSeconds
) AS consecutive_diffs
WHERE diff IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY raceId

        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count 
    FROM DriverGroups

)

       TA.chanceCreationCrossing, TA.chanceCreationShooting, TA.defencePressure, 
       TA.defenceAggression, TA.defenceTeamWidth 
FROM Team_Attributes AS TA
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT AVG(CAST(buildUpPlaySpeed AS REAL)) AS AvgBuildUpPlaySpeed, 
           AVG(CAST(defenceTeamWidth AS REAL)) AS AvgDefenceTeamWidth 
    FROM Team_Attributes 
    WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL AND defenceTeamWidth IS NOT NULL
) AS Avgs
WHERE TA.buildUpPlaySpeed > Avgs.AvgBuildUpPlaySpeed

WITH TeamData AS (
    SELECT 
        team_api_id,
        date,
        "buildUpPlaySpeed",
        "buildUpPlayPassing",
        "defenceTeamWidth",
        "chanceCreationShooting",
        LEAD("buildUpPlaySpeed") OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS next_buildUpPlaySpeed,
        LEAD("buildUpPlayPassing") OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS next_buildUpPlayPassing,
        LAG("defenceTeamWidth") OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS prev_defenceTeamWidth,
        LAG("chanceCreationShooting") OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS prev_chanceCreationShooting,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id) AS record_count
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
)
SELECT 
    team_api_id,
    date,
    "buildUpPlaySpeed",
    "buildUpPlayPassing",
    "defenceTeamWidth",
    "chanceCreationShooting",
    next_buildUpPlaySpeed,
    next_buildUpPlayPassing,
    prev_defenceTeamWidth,
    prev_chanceCreationShooting
FROM TeamData
WHERE record_count > 1
  AND prev_defenceTeamWidth > "buildUpPlaySpeed"
ORDER BY team_api_id, date

WITH CardLegalities AS (
    SELECT c.name AS card_name, l.format, l.status, l.id 
    FROM cards AS c 
    INNER JOIN legalities AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid 
    WHERE l.format IN ('commander', 'duel', 'legacy')
),
LegalityStats AS (
    SELECT 
        card_name, 
        format, 
        MAX(CASE WHEN status = 'Legal' THEN id END) AS legal_id, 
        MAX(CASE WHEN status = 'Banned' THEN id END) AS banned_id 
    FROM CardLegalities 
    GROUP BY card_name, format
)
SELECT 
    ls.card_name, 
    ls.format, 
    ls.legal_id, 
    ls.banned_id, 
    (COALESCE(ls.legal_id, 0) - COALESCE(ls.banned_id, 0)) AS id_diff

WHERE ls.legal_id IS NOT NULL OR ls.banned_id IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY ls.card_name ASC, ls.format ASC

WITH flagged_data AS (
    SELECT 
        p.id,
        p."First Date" AS as_of_date,
        p.diagnosis AS current_diagnosis,
        LAG(p.diagnosis) OVER (PARTITION BY p.id ORDER BY p."First Date") AS prev_diagnosis,
        CASE 
            WHEN p.diagnosis IN ('RA susp.', 'PSS', 'SLE') 
                 AND (LAG(p.diagnosis) OVER (PARTITION BY p.id ORDER BY p."First Date") IS NULL 
                      OR p.diagnosis <> LAG(p.diagnosis) OVER (PARTITION BY p.id ORDER BY p."First Date"))
            THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS is_target_change
    FROM patient AS p
)
SELECT 
    id,
    MIN(as_of_date) AS earliest_target_date,
    MAX(current_diagnosis) AS diagnosis_at_earliest  -- In case there are multiple, but we want the one at min date
FROM flagged_data
WHERE is_target_change = 1
GROUP BY id

WITH SchemaInfo AS (

    FROM pragma_table_info('schools')

    FROM satscores

) 
SELECT 
    '<Results>' || 
    COALESCE(
        (SELECT '<Columns>' || GROUP_CONCAT('<Column Name="' || column_name || '"><DataType>' || data_type || '</DataType></Column>', '') || '</Columns>' 
         FROM SchemaInfo),
        '<Columns></Columns>'
    ) ||

WITH zero_consumption AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Date, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY Date) as rn
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Consumption = 0
),
month_calc AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Date, rn,
           (CAST(SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS INTEGER) * 12 + CAST(SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS INTEGER)) as month_num
    FROM zero_consumption
),
diff_calc AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Date, rn, month_num,
           month_num - rn as diff
    FROM month_calc
)
SELECT CustomerID, MIN(Date) as StartMonth, MAX(Date) as EndMonth
FROM diff_calc
GROUP BY CustomerID, diff
ORDER BY CustomerID, StartMonth

WITH RECURSIVE split(value, rest) AS (
    -- Base case: Start with the full string and split on the first comma
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR('1.25,5.34,6.9', ',') > 0 THEN SUBSTR('1.25,5.34,6.9', 1, INSTR('1.25,5.34,6.9', ',') - 1)
            ELSE '1.25,5.34,6.9'  -- If no comma, use the whole string
        END,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR('1.25,5.34,6.9', ',') > 0 THEN SUBSTR('1.25,5.34,6.9', INSTR('1.25,5.34,6.9', ',') + 1)
            ELSE NULL  -- No remaining string if no comma
        END
    UNION ALL
    -- Recursive case: Continue splitting the remaining string
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(rest, ',') > 0 THEN SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, ',') - 1)
            ELSE rest  -- If no comma, use the remaining string
        END,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(rest, ',') > 0 THEN SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, ',') + 1)
            ELSE NULL
        END
    FROM split

)

)
